- id=8: color=W pix=1 (white) - the pixel inside left green square - back to white
- id=9: color=c pix=1 (charcoal) - the black pixel inside the right green square turned charcoal
So clicking on the left green square toggled the colors back. The white pixel in the left green square is white, and the black pixel in the right green square is charcoal.
So the pattern is:
- Clicking on the left green square toggles the colors of the two pixels.
- Clicking on the right green square also toggles the colors of the two pixels.
The goal might be to get both pixels to be the same color.
